reviewed_items.reviewer_notes: Spec deviation confirmed: Fulu spec mandates returning Electra blob limit (9) when no BlobSchedule entry matches, but code returns epoch-dependent fallback (6 for Deneb, 9 for Electra). Currently dormant (FuluForkEpoch=MaxUint64), but would cause consensus splits upon Fulu activation when validating historical epochs with no schedule match. Prysm's 31% network share exceeds Medium threshold (5%). Function has active callers in production paths (blockchain, sync, blob verification).
reviewed_items.spec_reference: Fulu spec: get_blob_parameters must return Electra defaults when no BLOB_SCHEDULE entry matches
